Supplemental Report Of Executor, Request For Confirmation Of Assignment Of Italian Property, Approval Of Assignment Of Portion Of Beneficiary'S Bequest, Request For Instruction To Paty Deceased Beneficiary'S Bequest To Heir,
Off Calendar Jun-30-2008 Continued To Jul-28-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Victor Sotomayor for Aaron Boyd (Petitioner/Executor).

The Court stated that there was an issue with the check being payable to the Deceased Co-Executor. Mr. Sotomayor stated that he suspected that an Estate for Hugh Boyd would be opened in San Mateo County and requested the Court authorize the request for the remaining matters. The matter was continued to July 28, 2008 for Mr. Sotomayor to figure out some other way to pay Hugh Boyd's bequest, to provide proof of the Estate of Hugh Boyd and for proof of the check being properly mailed out. The Court will review the order for signing as to the remaining issues.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Peggy Tsujimoto CSR#5229. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris and M. Anderson.
